title: neoevansia diguetii
intro: Neoevansia diguetii, also known as 'Mexican Prickly Poppy', is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Neoevansia diguetii include relief from pain, inflammation, and muscle spasms, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Neoevansia diguetii can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
